column1: # WP-14 integration manifest: expected Redis Stream XLEN after replaying
# every fixture pcap in tests/fixtures/dhcp/ exactly once through
# Every committed fixture pcap is a single packet (verified against the
# classic pcap record headers), and the DHCPv4/v6 parsers always emit an
# event for a well-formed-enough frame -- including the two
# *_malformed_optlen fixtures, whose expected.md documents that parsing
# still succeeds (best-effort option resync) -- so the expected count per
# stream is just the number of v4/v6 fixture files:
# Format: <stream>\t<expected XLEN>. Blank lines and lines starting with '#'
